contentList.content: Comfortable Boots
Made of soft, sheepskin-lined leather, these are the perfect boots to wear around the campfire on a chilly night.
Bolster
Bolster your allies against the dangers that lie ahead.

Hit point maximum increased by [1].

When you roll a 1 on an Attack Roll, Ability Check, or Saving Throw, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

You can see in the dark up to [2].
Elixir of Bolstering
Drinking this elixir grants the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="TutorialSupplies_Bolster">Bolster</LSTag> spell.

Imbue a weapon with elemental power. It receives a +[1] bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag>, and deals an additional 1d4 damage of your choice. The weapon can't be knocked out of the wielder's hand.
Has a +[1] bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag> and deals an additional [2]. Can't be knocked out of the wielder's hand.
Imbue a weapon with elemental power. It receives a +[1] bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag>, and deals an additional [2]. The weapon can't be knocked out of the wielder's hand.
Imbue a weapon with elemental power. It receives a +[1] bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag>, and deals an additional [2]. The weapon can't be knocked out of the wielder's hand.
Imbue a weapon with elemental power. It receives a +[1] bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag>, and deals an additional [2]. The weapon can't be knocked out of the wielder's hand.
Imbue a weapon with elemental power. It receives a +[1] bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag>, and deals an additional [2]. The weapon can't be knocked out of the wielder's hand.
Imbue a weapon with elemental power. It receives a +[1] bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag>, and deals an additional [2]. The weapon can't be knocked out of the wielder's hand.
Elixir of Elemental Weaponry
Drinking this elixir grants the <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="TutorialSupplies_ElementalWeapon">Elemental Weapon</LSTag> spell.
Gain <LSTag Tooltip="Expertise">Expertise</LSTag> in Deception, Intimidation, Performance, and Persuasion.
Has <LSTag Tooltip="Expertise">Expertise</LSTag> in Deception, Intimidation, Performance, and Persuasion.
Gain <LSTag Tooltip="Expertise">Expertise</LSTag> in Acrobatics, Sleight of Hand, and Stealth.
Has <LSTag Tooltip="Expertise">Expertise</LSTag> in Acrobatics, Sleight of Hand, and Stealth.
Gain <LSTag Tooltip="Expertise">Expertise</LSTag> in Arcana, History, Investigation, Nature, and Religion.
Has <LSTag Tooltip="Expertise">Expertise</LSTag> in Arcana, History, Investigation, Nature, and Religion.
Gain <LSTag Tooltip="Expertise">Expertise</LSTag> in Athletics.
Has <LSTag Tooltip="Expertise">Expertise</LSTag> in Athletics.
Gain <LSTag Tooltip="Expertise">Expertise</LSTag> in Animal Handling, Insight, Medicine, Perception, and Survival.
Has <LSTag Tooltip="Expertise">Expertise</LSTag> in Animal Handling, Insight, Medicine, Perception, and Survival.
Gain <LSTag Tooltip="Expertise">Expertise</LSTag> in all <LSTag Tooltip="Skill">Skills</LSTag> of a chosen <LSTag Tooltip="Abilities">Ability</LSTag>.
Elixir of Knowledge

Drinking this elixir grants <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="TutorialSupplies_KnowledgeOfTheAges">Knowledge of the Ages</LSTag>, and <LSTag Type="Passive" Tooltip="JackOfAllTrades">Jack of All Trades</LSTag>.
Elixir of Flying
Drinking this elixir grants <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Projectile_Fly">Fly</LSTag>.
Potion of Overpowering
Temporarily gain a significant boost to your strength, health, armor class, attack rolls, damage rolls, and saving throws.
Blade of the Banshee

This slender katana possesses a blade that seems to emit a faint, ghostly chill when drawn. Its tsuba is carved in the likeness of a weeping woman, and when swung through the air, it emits a low, mournful wail that chills the blood of any who hear it.
Splinters of Frost
Conjure [1] splinter(s) of ice. Reduces the target's <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">movement speed</LSTag> by [2].
Frozen Rapier
Sculpted from a single shard of perpetually freezing glacial ice, this elegant rapier features a needle-sharp blade that shimmers with frost and exhales a deadly chill.
Radiant Silver Sword
This heavy silver sword pulses with a gentle light.
Enchanted Blade
Gain +1 to <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Spell Attack</LSTag>, Damage, and <LSTag Tooltip="SpellDifficultyClass">Save DC</LSTag> rolls.
Kereska's Favour
At <LSTag>Level 9</LSTag> you gain <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout_MAG_TheChromatic_ChromaticAttunement">Kereska's Favour</LSTag>.
Lightning Weapon
Lightning arcs along the length of the weapon
Sword of Storms
Forged from gleaming silver, this elegant sword constantly pulses with jagged arcs of blue electricity and hums with the low rumble of distant thunder.
Camp Clothing
Contains a selection of camp clothing.
Camp Shoes
Contains a selection of camp shoes.
Underwear
Contains a selection of underwear.
Dream Guardian Armour
Contains a selection of Dream Guardian armour.
Potions
Contains a selection of potions.
Dyes
Contains a selection of dyes.
Weapons
Contains a selection of weapons.
Abazigal's Goods
Contains a selection of items sold by the Echo of Abazigal.
Whenever you deal damage with an attack, you gain <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="MAG_GISH_ARCANE_ACUITY">Arcane Acuity</LSTag> for 2 turns.
